OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Vince Alvarenga
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Latisha Taylor and Clinton Sims-Williams are present.
Attorney, Gloria Chun , representing the defendant Clinton Simms-Williams through limited scope.
Attorney, Craig Murdock , representing the defendant Latisha Taylor through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Peter Van Zandt, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept 504. ,for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JULY 08, 2013 remains on calendar.
